steps.title: Identify the grammatical structure
steps.content: The sentence has an independent clause ('The Bishop of Ostia... condemned the eating utensils') followed by a noun phrase acting as the object of 'considered.' The blank serves as the direct object pronoun.

steps.title: Match the pronoun to the antecedent
steps.content: The pronoun must refer to 'eating utensils,' a plural noun. Only 'them' agrees in number and functions as an object pronoun. The other choices ('this,' 'that,' 'it') are singular and would mismatch the plural antecedent. That matches choice A — A is correct.
